title: Parse Disk Usage Report
description:
Parse `df -h` output. The `Use%` column ends with `%`; the last column is the mount point. Return mount points where usage > 80%, one per line as `mount_point use_percent`, sorted by use_percent descending.

Return an empty string if none exceed 80%.
constraints: Use% column ends with %; strip it for comparison

examples.input:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        50G   45G    5G  90% /
/dev/sda2        20G    2G   18G  10% /boot
/dev/sda3       100G   85G   15G  85% /data
examples.explanation: See test case: Two partitions over 80%

test_cases.input:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        50G   45G    5G  90% /
/dev/sda2        20G    2G   18G  10% /boot
/dev/sda3       100G   85G   15G  85% /data

Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        50G    5G   45G  10% /

Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1       100G   60G   40G  60% /
/dev/sda2       100G   40G   60G  40% /tmp
